profile_backed_target.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-profile-pass161 cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64)' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 5

lever.summary: The private W work buffer in one_sided_jacobi_svd_real is now column-major, matching the column-streaming Jacobi sweep access pattern used by pinv_svd.
lever.alien_primitive: data-layout / loop-nest locality transformation for numerical linear algebra

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-m95v5-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/pinv_256x128_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10

after.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-m95v5-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/pinv_256x128_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 10

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: The Jacobi pair order p,q and every row loop inside alpha/beta/gamma dot products and W rotations still run in ascending order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: Singular-value sorting remains total_cmp over the same computed column norms; no new pivot or tie rule was introduced.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: For each scalar update, the operand values and accumulation order are unchanged. The only change is W addressing: col * m + row instead of row * n + col.
isomorphism_proof.error_surface: pinv shape, empty-matrix, rcond cutoff, dtype, and fallback behavior are unchanged.
isomorphism_proof.nan_surface: NaN propagation follows the same pair/row traversal and arithmetic operations as the prior row-major work buffer.

validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-m95v5-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib svd -- --nocapture

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-m95v5-pinv-test cargo test -p fj-lax --lib pinv -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-m95v5-check cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets

RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-m95v5-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings

validation.result: failed on pre-existing unrelated linalg.rs formatting outside this pass; no whole-file formatting was applied

exit 1 for pre-existing file-wide inventory, including test panic macros, unwrap/expect, direct indexing, and asserts; UBS fmt/clippy/check/test-build sections were clean and no unsafe blocks were reported

fallback: If a future SVD or pinv parity regression appears, revert this commit to restore row-major W storage in one_sided_jacobi_svd_real.
next_profile_note: Re-profile linalg after this keep because pinv_256x128 is no longer the same bottleneck shape.
